description:
You are a solar thermal engineer designing a Concentrating Solar Power (CSP) facility. Energy3D is open with a blank scene. Perform the following steps:
1. Set the site location to Phoenix, AZ.
2. Draw a Foundation on the ground.
3. Add Parabolic Troughs onto the foundation.
4. Using the properties panel/context menu, configure the troughs to have: Width = 6.0m, Reflectance = 0.95 (95%), and Absorptance = 0.92 (92%).
5. Orient the troughs North-South (Azimuth 0 or 180).
6. Expand the array so there are at least 20 parabolic troughs.
7. Save the project to ~/Documents/Energy3D/trough_plant.ng3.
